expectations.text: Removes 'rockstar', 'ninja' and replaces with descriptive professional language
expectations.evidence: Inclusive Language Check table documents: 'rockstar DevOps ninja' removed and replaced with 'DevOps Engineer'. No instances of rockstar or ninja remain in the rewritten JD.

Inclusive Language Check table documents: 'young and energetic team' removed and replaced with 'high-performing engineering team'. Notes it is 'discriminatory under Equality Act 2010 (UK), ADEA (US)'.

expectations.text: Replaces '10+ years Docker' and '7+ years Kubernetes' with skill proficiency descriptions
expectations.evidence: Table shows: '10+ years Docker experience' replaced with 'strong proficiency in container technologies'; '7+ years Kubernetes' replaced with 'solid experience with container orchestration at production scale'.

expectations.text: Flags 'competitive salary' and either replaces with a range or explicitly states salary range should be added
expectations.evidence: Table documents: 'competitive salary' flagged. Salary section reads '[Range — not provided. Recommend adding a specific range before publishing. "Competitive salary" is not acceptable — it deters candidates.]'

expectations.text: Replaces 'culture fit' with specific behaviours or ways of working
expectations.evidence: Table documents: 'Culture fit is essential' replaced. Character/Ways of Working section now has specific descriptors: 'communicate clearly with both technical and non-technical colleagues' and 'comfortable with ambiguity and can prioritise effectively'.

expectations.text: Adds equal opportunities statement and reasonable adjustments offer
expectations.evidence: Equal Opportunities section added with full statement. Reasonable Adjustments section added: 'If you require any reasonable adjustments during the recruitment process, please let us know when you apply.'

expectations.text: Includes an INCLUSIVE LANGUAGE CHECK section documenting what was changed and why
expectations.evidence: Full 'INCLUSIVE LANGUAGE CHECK: PASS (with corrections applied)' section with 11-row table documenting each original phrase, the problem, and the action taken with citations.
